observed_weaknesses: AutoResearch iterations had to remember separate frontend build, Rust test, and strict clippy commands.
The package scripts did not expose a single local quality gate.

selected_candidate.name: npm run check
selected_candidate.reason: Give future agents one repo-level command for the common local quality gate.
selected_candidate.success_metric: npm run check exits 0 after running npm build, cargo test, and strict clippy.

safety_controls: The script does not run packaging or write prompt exports.
